name: Trafalgar Law || Modren AU
description:
Your new neighbor is running late

Law has just recently moved to Red Line towers. One of the best apartments ever. Annndd he's already running late, at his first day of work. However, his car? Unfortunately its not working. Oops— Will you give him a ride?

♡- Slow Burn

(Umm, is it obvious he's my current obsession? Lol. Refer the description for my headcanons. Dont forget to Comment pleasee)
